---
title: "Agentic Basics"
toc: false
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  margin-width: 0px
---

```{=html}
<p class="slide-embed-link">
  <a class="slide-embed-button" href="slides/basics/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    Open slides in a new tab
  </a>
</p>

<div class="slide-embed">
  <iframe
    src="slides/basics/"
    title="Agentic Basics slides"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>
```
